title: hieracium racemosum subsp. barbatum
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. barbatum, also known as the clustered hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium racemosum subsp. barbatum include treating digestive issues, wound healing, and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
